svg.title: Atlas — Architecture
svg.desc: Topologically-ordered architecture diagram of the Atlas stack: external clients enter via Kong, the gateway routes to Apps and Agents, which call the LLM Core (LiteLLM → Ollama + cloud + TEI Reranker) and the Media + Data layers; Ray + Spark supply distributed compute; Prometheus + Grafana provide observability.

g.text: Postgres + pgvector · Auth · Storage · Realtime · Studio
single source of truth for public.llms
Spark Master + Workers + History + Connect ▸ SPARK_SOURCE
Prometheus ▸ scrapes Kong · LiteLLM · n8n · Backend · Weaviate · MinIO · DB sidecars
All edges are runtime / request-path. Init-time bootstrap calls (LiteLLM-init reading public.llms, Ollama-pull warming models, Prometheus scrape config) are omitted for clarity.
